phone.title: Grab Food — Phone Number
phone.description: Enter your Grab account phone number. An OTP will be sent via SMS.

otp.title: Grab Food — Verify OTP
otp.description: Enter the OTP code sent to {phone}

token.title: Grab Food — Manual Token
token.description: Open food.grab.com in your browser, log in, then open DevTools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → https://food.grab.com and copy the `access_token` value.

reauth_confirm.title: Grab Food — Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Grab session for {phone} has expired. Choose how to re-authenticate.

error.otp_send_failed: Grab rejected the OTP request. Check the phone number and country code, then check the Home Assistant log for the full API error.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Grab servers. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_otp: Invalid OTP code. Please try again.
error.invalid_token: The token was rejected by Grab. Make sure you copied the full access_token value.

abort.already_configured: This Grab account is already configured.
